result.stdout:
dejan-skills

Usage:
  dejan-skills list [--repo <owner/repo|url>] [--ref <branch|tag|sha>]
  dejan-skills init [options]
  dejan-skills bootstrap [options]
  dejan-skills update [options]

Options:
  --target <path>         Target repository path. Default: current directory.
  --source-path <path>    Read content from a local repo checkout instead of GitHub.
  --repo <owner/repo>     Source GitHub repo. Default: dejandjenic/skills.
  --ref <name>            Source git ref. Default: main.
  --platforms <items>     Comma-separated: github,claude,opencode. Default: all.
  --include <items>       Comma-separated: skills,prompts. Default: skills,prompts.
  --skills <list>         Comma-separated skill folder names.
  --prompts <list>        Comma-separated prompt names without .prompt.md.
  --with-skills           Bootstrap preset: include skills in addition to prompts.
  --no-prune              Update preset: do not remove stale previously managed files.
  --force                 Overwrite existing files.
  --dry-run               Show what would be copied without writing files.

Examples:
  dejan-skills list
  dejan-skills list --repo https://github.com/dejandjenic/skills
  dejan-skills init --target ../my-repo
  dejan-skills init --target ../my-repo --platforms github,claude,opencode
  dejan-skills bootstrap
  dejan-skills bootstrap --with-skills
  dejan-skills init --target ../my-repo --source-path ../skills-clone --repo https://github.com/dejandjenic/skills
  dejan-skills init --skills dejan-workflow-coding-assistant --prompts dejan.workflow-coding-assistant
  dejan-skills update --target ../my-repo --force

Usage:
  dejan-skills list [--repo <owner/repo|url>] [--ref <branch|tag|sha>]
  dejan-skills init [options]
  dejan-skills bootstrap [options]
  dejan-skills update [options]

Options:
  --target <path>         Target repository path. Default: current directory.
  --source-path <path>    Read content from a local repo checkout instead of GitHub.
  --repo <owner/repo>     Source GitHub repo. Default: dejandjenic/skills.
  --ref <name>            Source git ref. Default: main.
  --platforms <items>     Comma-separated: github,claude,opencode. Default: all.
  --include <items>       Comma-separated: skills,prompts. Default: skills,prompts.
  --skills <list>         Comma-separated skill folder names.
  --prompts <list>        Comma-separated prompt names without .prompt.md.

  --no-prune              Update preset: do not remove stale previously managed files.
  --force                 Overwrite existing files.
  --dry-run               Show what would be copied without writing files.

  dejan-skills init --target ../my-repo --platforms github,claude,opencode
